title: Fall Guy
writer: Jerry Warner, Cornell Woolrich, John O'Dea
actors: Teala Loring, Robert Armstrong, Leo Penn
plot: Tom Cochrane (Leo Penn'), full of dope (cocaine) and covered with blood, is picked up by the police and then questioned by detectives Shannon (Douglas Fowley) and Taylor (Harry Strang), but manages to escape. His girl friend Lois ...
